creator: gunther@aurora.regenstrief.org
text:
Just upgraded to 4.4 hoping that the integration of the KAME
stuff would be more advanced. I notice that ALTQ isn't integrated
at all even though that part of KAME seems to be quite stable
and working very well. I suggest that ALTQ be moved into the
releases.

Fix: 

My workaround is to use KAME snap kit, but at some point I'd love 
if this were no longer necessary.
